== Notes for [[Item:Q117607|Q117607]] ==

Pedro Alfonso of León, 1st Lord of Tenorio (ca. 1196/ca. 1200-1226), Grand Master of Santiago, son of Alfonso IX 'el Baboso' Fernández Rey de León e Aldonza Martínez da Silva, married N de Villarmayor, and had issue.
--------------------
Infante Don Pedro Alfonso de Leon, hijo del Rey Alfonso IX de Leon, Maestre de Santiago, fallecido en 1226.

Lord of Tenorio

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
